description_es: Disciplina que busca maximizar los ingresos y la rentabilidad mediante la gestión estratégica de precios, inventario, demanda, canales y segmentación.
description_en: A discipline focused on maximizing revenue and profitability through the strategic management of pricing, inventory, demand, distribution channels, and market segmentation.

description_es: Conjunto de servicios, atributos y experiencias que el hotel ofrece al cliente y que justifican su valor percibido.
description_en: The combination of services, attributes, and experiences a hotel offers to guests that justifies its perceived value.

description_es: Persona, empresa o segmento que compra o consume los servicios del hotel, con necesidades y sensibilidad al precio diferentes.
description_en: An individual, company, or market segment that purchases or consumes hotel services, each with different needs and price sensitivity.

description_es: Técnica enfocada en vender la capacidad adecuada, al cliente adecuado, en el momento adecuado y al mejor precio posible.
description_en: A pricing discipline focused on selling the right inventory to the right customer, at the right time, and at the best possible price.

description_es: Variable temporal que condiciona la demanda, la urgencia de compra y la disposición a pagar del cliente.
description_en: The time-related variable that influences demand, booking urgency, and customers' willingness to pay.

description_es: Valor monetario asignado a una habitación o servicio, ajustable según demanda, competencia, canal y estrategia comercial.
description_en: The monetary value assigned to a room or service, adjusted according to demand, competition, distribution channel, and commercial strategy.

description_es: Medio por el que el cliente llega a la reserva, como web directa, OTA, agencia, GDS o teléfono.
description_en: The distribution channel through which a reservation is made, including the direct website, OTA, travel agency, GDS, or telephone.

description_es: Limitación estructural de habitaciones, mesas, asientos o recursos disponibles que no puede ampliarse fácilmente a corto plazo.
description_en: The structural limitation of available hotel rooms, seats, tables, or other resources that cannot be easily expanded in the short term.

description_es: Comportamiento fluctuante de la demanda según temporada, eventos, día de la semana, mercado emisor y comportamiento del cliente.
description_en: The fluctuating behavior of demand influenced by seasonality, events, day of the week, source markets, and customer purchasing behavior.

description_es: Inventario que pierde valor si no se vende a tiempo, como una habitación vacía en una noche concreta.
description_en: Inventory that permanently loses its value if it is not sold in time, such as an unsold hotel room for a specific night.

description_es: Estructura de costes que permanece aunque la ocupación cambie, como personal, alquileres, suministros base o mantenimiento.
description_en: A cost structure in which major operating expenses—such as payroll, rent, core utilities, and maintenance—remain largely unchanged regardless of occupancy levels.

description_es: Ventas realizadas antes de la fecha de estancia, útiles para prever ocupación y ajustar precios con antelación.
description_en: Reservations made before the arrival date, providing valuable information to forecast occupancy and optimize pricing decisions in advance.

description_es: División de clientes en grupos con necesidades, comportamientos y disposición a pagar diferentes.
description_en: The process of dividing customers into groups with different needs, purchasing behaviors, and willingness to pay.

description_es: Estrategia de ajuste de precios según demanda, ocupación, antelación, canal y condiciones de mercado.
description_en: A pricing strategy that adjusts room rates according to demand, occupancy, booking window, distribution channel, and market conditions.

description_es: Uso de modelos inteligentes para analizar datos, prever demanda, automatizar decisiones y apoyar estrategias de revenue.
description_en: The use of intelligent models to analyze data, forecast demand, automate decisions, and support Revenue Management strategies.

description_es: Protección de sistemas, datos de clientes, pagos y conexiones tecnológicas frente a riesgos digitales.
description_en: The protection of hotel systems, customer data, payment information, and technology infrastructure against digital threats.

description_es: Automatización de tareas repetitivas como actualización de precios, distribución, alertas, informes o reglas de inventario.
description_en: The automation of repetitive tasks such as rate updates, distribution, alerts, reporting, and inventory management rules.

description_es: Transformación de procesos manuales en procesos digitales conectados, medibles y escalables.
description_en: The transformation of manual processes into connected, measurable, and scalable digital workflows.

description_es: Infraestructura tecnológica que permite capturar datos, distribuir precios, automatizar procesos y analizar resultados.
description_en: The technological infrastructure that enables hotels to collect data, distribute rates, automate processes, and analyze business performance.

description_es: Equipos y profesionales que interpretan datos, toman decisiones y ejecutan la estrategia de revenue.
description_en: The teams and professionals who interpret data, make decisions, and execute the Revenue Management strategy.

description_es: Metodologías, rutinas y flujos de trabajo que convierten datos y decisiones en acciones consistentes.
description_en: The methodologies, routines, and workflows that transform data and decisions into consistent operational actions.

description_es: Información histórica, actual y futura que permite entender demanda, rendimiento, clientes, canales y competencia.
description_en: Historical, current, and future information that enables hotels to understand demand, performance, guests, distribution channels, and competitors.

description_es: Reservas confirmadas actualmente para fechas futuras, usadas para analizar ritmo de venta y ocupación esperada.
description_en: Confirmed reservations currently held for future dates, used to analyze booking pace and forecast occupancy.

description_es: Resultado final del año anterior, utilizado como referencia histórica para comparar rendimiento y planificar objetivos.
description_en: The final performance results from the previous year, used as a historical benchmark for evaluating performance and setting future objectives.

description_es: Situación registrada exactamente en la misma fecha del año anterior, útil para comparar ritmo de reservas.
description_en: The business situation recorded on the exact same date of the previous year, used to compare booking pace.

description_es: Estimación futura de demanda, ocupación, ingresos o resultados basada en datos y tendencias.
description_en: A projection of future demand, occupancy, revenue, or business performance based on historical data, current trends, and predictive analysis.

description_es: Objetivo económico planificado que sirve como referencia para medir desviaciones y desempeño.
description_en: The planned financial target used as a benchmark to measure performance and identify business deviations.

description_es: Resultado acumulado desde el inicio del año hasta la fecha actual.
description_en: The cumulative business performance from the beginning of the year through the current date.

description_es: Optimización del consumo energético para reducir costes, emisiones y dependencia de recursos.
description_en: The optimization of energy consumption to reduce operating costs, carbon emissions, and dependence on energy resources.

description_es: Gestión responsable del consumo de agua en habitaciones, lavandería, piscinas, jardines y operaciones.
description_en: The responsible management of water consumption across guest rooms, laundry operations, swimming pools, gardens, and hotel facilities.

description_es: Reducción, clasificación y tratamiento de residuos generados por la operación hotelera.
description_en: The reduction, separation, and responsible management of waste generated by hotel operations.

description_es: Relación del hotel con proveedores, empleo, cultura y economía del entorno local.
description_en: The relationship between the hotel and its local suppliers, workforce, culture, and surrounding economy.

description_es: Compromiso del hotel con prácticas éticas, sociales y responsables hacia empleados, clientes y comunidad.
description_en: The hotel's commitment to ethical, social, and responsible practices toward employees, guests, suppliers, and the local community.

description_es: Aplicación de políticas de igualdad, inclusión y trato justo dentro de la organización.
description_en: The implementation of equal opportunity, diversity, inclusion, and fair treatment policies throughout the organization.

description_es: Sellos o acreditaciones que validan estándares de calidad, sostenibilidad, seguridad o responsabilidad.
description_en: Recognized certifications or accreditations that validate standards of quality, sustainability, safety, or corporate responsibility.

description_es: Indicador que mide el precio medio vendido por habitación ocupada durante un período determinado.
description_en: A key performance indicator that measures the average price achieved for each occupied room during a given period.

description_es: Porcentaje de habitaciones ocupadas respecto al inventario disponible en un período concreto.
description_en: The percentage of occupied rooms relative to the total available room inventory during a specific period.

description_es: Promedio de noches que permanece alojado un cliente o reserva en el hotel.
description_en: The average number of nights a guest or reservation stays at the hotel.

name_en: Gross Operating Profit per Available Room (GOPPAR)
description_es: Indicador que relaciona el beneficio operativo bruto con las habitaciones disponibles.
description_en: A key performance indicator that measures gross operating profit generated per available room.

description_es: Indicador que mide los ingresos de alojamiento generados por habitación disponible.
description_en: A key performance indicator that measures the accommodation revenue generated per available room.

description_es: RevPAR ajustado descontando costes de distribución, comisiones u otros costes comerciales.
description_en: RevPAR adjusted by deducting distribution costs, commissions, and other commercial expenses.

description_es: Indicador que incluye ingresos totales por habitación disponible, no solo alojamiento.
description_en: A performance indicator that measures total revenue generated per available room, including accommodation and all ancillary revenue streams.

description_es: Tarifa flexible que permite cancelar sin coste hasta una fecha o plazo determinado.
description_en: A flexible rate that allows guests to cancel without penalty until a specified date or deadline.

description_es: Tarifa con condiciones restrictivas que normalmente no permite reembolso a cambio de mejor precio.
description_en: A restrictive rate plan that generally does not allow refunds in exchange for a lower room rate.

description_es: Tarifa o condición especial diseñada para reservas con varias noches o estancias prolongadas.
description_en: A special rate plan or booking condition designed for extended stays or reservations spanning multiple nights.

description_es: Tarifa incentivada para reservas realizadas con antelación, útil para captar demanda temprana.
description_en: A promotional rate designed to encourage reservations made well in advance of arrival.

description_es: Tarifa negociada para empresas, cuentas corporativas o viajeros de negocios recurrentes.
description_en: A negotiated rate offered to companies, corporate accounts, or frequent business travelers.

description_es: Consistencia de precios entre canales para evitar conflictos de distribución y percepción de valor.
description_en: The practice of maintaining consistent room rates across all distribution channels to avoid channel conflicts and preserve customer value perception.

description_es: Tarifa ajustable que cambia según demanda, ocupación, antelación, canal y estrategia.
description_en: A pricing strategy in which room rates change according to demand, occupancy, booking window, distribution channel, and market conditions.

description_es: Precio neto ofrecido a intermediarios o distribuidores, deducida la comisión, para que estos apliquen posteriormente su propio margen comercial.
description_en: A net room rate offered to intermediaries or distributors, excluding commission, allowing them to apply their own commercial markup.

description_es: Diseño y optimización de la web del hotel para comunicar valor, mejorar conversión y potenciar venta directa.
description_en: The design and optimization of a hotel's website to communicate value, improve conversion rates, and increase direct bookings.

description_es: Uso de plataformas sociales para visibilidad, inspiración, relación con clientes y construcción de marca.
description_en: The use of social media platforms to increase visibility, inspire travelers, engage with guests, and strengthen brand identity.

description_es: Mensajes, tono y narrativa utilizados para transmitir propuesta de valor y diferenciar el hotel.
description_en: The messaging, tone of voice, and storytelling used to communicate the hotel's value proposition and differentiate it from competitors.

description_es: Acciones de pago para captar demanda, aumentar visibilidad y dirigir tráfico a canales estratégicos.
description_en: Paid marketing activities designed to generate demand, increase visibility, and drive traffic toward strategic distribution channels.

description_es: Sistema y estrategia para gestionar relaciones con clientes, segmentar comunicaciones y fidelizar.
description_en: A system and strategic approach for managing customer relationships, segmenting communications, and building guest loyalty.

description_es: Presencia en comparadores de precios que muestran disponibilidad y tarifas por canal.
description_en: Presence on hotel metasearch platforms that compare room availability and rates across multiple booking channels.

description_es: Comunicación directa por correo electrónico para captar, fidelizar y reactivar clientes.
description_en: Direct communication via email to acquire, retain, and reactivate guests.

description_es: Comparación con el mismo día del año anterior para analizar ritmo y comportamiento comercial.
description_en: A comparison with the same calendar day of the previous year to analyze booking pace and commercial performance.

description_es: Conjunto de estrategias digitales orientadas a atraer tráfico, convertir reservas y fortalecer la marca.
description_en: The collection of digital strategies designed to attract traffic, generate bookings, and strengthen the hotel's brand.

description_es: Indicador de participación o penetración del hotel frente a su mercado o conjunto competitivo.
description_en: An indicator that measures the hotel's share of demand within its market or competitive set.

description_es: Hoteles o alojamientos comparables que compiten por el mismo cliente, zona, segmento o propuesta de valor.
description_en: Hotels or accommodation providers competing for the same guests, geographic area, market segment, or value proposition.

description_es: Índice que compara la ocupación del hotel con la ocupación del conjunto competitivo.
description_en: An index that compares a hotel's occupancy against the occupancy of its competitive set.

description_es: Índice que compara el RevPAR del hotel con el RevPAR del conjunto competitivo.
description_en: An index that compares a hotel's RevPAR with the RevPAR of its competitive set.

description_es: Herramienta que sincroniza precios, disponibilidad e inventario entre el PMS, motor de reservas y canales externos.
description_en: A system that synchronizes room rates, availability, and inventory between the PMS, booking engine, and external distribution channels.

description_es: Sistema que analiza datos y recomienda o automatiza decisiones de precios, restricciones y forecast.
description_en: A system that analyzes data and recommends or automates pricing, restriction, and forecasting decisions.

description_es: Herramienta que monitoriza precios de competidores y canales para apoyar decisiones comerciales.
description_en: A tool that monitors competitors' prices and distribution channels to support commercial decision-making.

description_es: Sistema central de gestión hotelera para reservas, clientes, disponibilidad, facturación y operación diaria.
description_en: The hotel's central management system for reservations, guest information, availability, billing, and daily operations.

description_es: Datos de búsqueda, demanda y comportamiento viajero que ayudan a anticipar oportunidades de mercado.
description_en: Search, demand, and traveler behavior data used to anticipate market opportunities and future demand.

description_es: Herramientas de análisis y visualización que convierten datos en información útil para la toma de decisiones.
description_en: Analytics and visualization tools that transform raw data into actionable insights for decision-making.

description_es: Seguimiento y gestión de reseñas, valoraciones y percepción pública del hotel.
description_en: The monitoring and management of guest reviews, ratings, and the hotel's public perception.

description_es: Motor que permite reservar directamente en la web del hotel, conectando disponibilidad, precios y condiciones.
description_en: A booking platform that enables guests to make direct reservations through the hotel's website by connecting availability, pricing, and booking conditions.

description_es: Comparación sistemática de resultados, precios o prácticas frente al mercado o competidores.
description_en: The systematic comparison of performance, pricing, and business practices against competitors or the wider market.

description_es: Proceso de atraer y seleccionar perfiles adecuados para el equipo hotelero y la estrategia comercial.
description_en: The process of attracting and selecting the right professionals to support the hotel's team and commercial strategy.

description_es: Capacitación continua del equipo para mejorar competencias, servicio, ventas y toma de decisiones.
description_en: The ongoing development of the team to improve skills, service, sales and decision-making.

description_es: Acciones para conservar talento, reducir rotación y mantener conocimiento dentro de la organización.
description_en: Strategies designed to retain talent, reduce employee turnover, and preserve organizational knowledge.

description_es: Capacidad de guiar equipos, alinear objetivos y fomentar cultura de rendimiento y mejora continua.
description_en: The ability to guide teams, align objectives, and foster a culture of performance and continuous improvement.

description_es: Condición que exige un número mínimo de noches para aceptar una reserva en determinadas fechas.
description_en: A booking restriction requiring guests to stay a minimum number of nights during specific dates.

description_es: Pago parcial o garantía económica solicitada para confirmar una reserva.
description_en: A partial payment or financial guarantee required to confirm a reservation.

description_es: Cupo de habitaciones asignado a un canal, operador o colaborador bajo condiciones específicas.
description_en: A block of rooms allocated to a distribution channel, tour operator, or commercial partner under specific contractual conditions.

description_es: Inventario disponible para la venta en una fecha, categoría, canal o condición concreta.
description_en: Inventory available for sale on a specific date, room category, distribution channel, or booking condition.

description_es: Cierre temporal de ventas para una fecha, tarifa, habitación o canal específico.
description_en: The temporary closure of sales for a specific date, rate, room type, or distribution channel.

description_es: Reglas que definen cómo, cuándo y con qué coste puede cancelarse una reserva.
description_en: Rules defining how, when, and at what cost a reservation may be cancelled.

description_es: Condiciones que determinan forma, momento y garantías de pago de una reserva.
description_en: The conditions that determine the payment method, timing, and guarantees required for a reservation.

description_es: Plazo de antelación previo a la llegada en el que las reservas no garantizadas expiran.
description_en: The period before arrival during which unconfirmed reservations or allotments automatically expire and are returned to general inventory.

description_es: Área de comidas, bebidas, desayunos, bares, restaurantes y servicios asociados al consumo interno.
description_en: The department responsible for food, beverages, breakfast service, bars, restaurants, and all services related to on-property dining.

description_es: Área de atención al cliente, check-in, check-out, información, gestión de reservas y coordinación operativa.
description_en: The department responsible for guest service, check-in, check-out, information, reservation management, and operational coordination.

description_es: Funciones de limpieza, preparación de habitaciones, mantenimiento preventivo y conservación del hotel.
description_en: The departments responsible for room cleaning, room preparation, preventive maintenance, and overall property upkeep.

description_es: Gestión integral de la experiencia del huésped antes, durante y después de la estancia.
description_en: The comprehensive management of the guest experience before, during, and after the stay.

description_es: Red global utilizada por agencias y empresas para acceder a disponibilidad, tarifas y reservas hoteleras.
description_en: A global distribution network used by travel agencies and corporations to access hotel availability, rates, and reservations.

description_es: Canal de distribución online asociado a Booking, con alta visibilidad y modelo basado en comisión.
description_en: An online distribution channel through Booking.com, offering high visibility through a commission-based business model.

description_es: Intermediario online que comercializa alojamiento a cambio de visibilidad y comisión.
description_en: An online intermediary that markets hotel accommodations in exchange for visibility and commission.

description_es: Canal propio del hotel, como web, teléfono, email o recepción, normalmente con menor coste de distribución.
description_en: The hotel's own booking channels, such as its website, telephone, email, or front desk, typically offering the lowest distribution costs.

description_es: Canal de distribución perteneciente al ecosistema Expedia, relevante en mercados internacionales.
description_en: A distribution channel within the Expedia Group ecosystem, with strong relevance across international markets.

description_es: Intermediarios que agrupan alojamiento con otros servicios turísticos, como vuelos, traslados o paquetes.
description_en: Travel intermediaries that bundle accommodation with other tourism services such as flights, transfers, and vacation packages.

description_es: Plataforma orientada principalmente a alojamiento alternativo, apartamentos y experiencias de estancia.
description_en: A platform primarily focused on alternative accommodations, apartments, and unique travel experiences.

description_es: Grupo hotelero internacional utilizado como referencia de marca, distribución, fidelización y escala.
description_en: An international hotel group widely recognized as a benchmark for branding, distribution, loyalty, and operational scale.

description_es: Cadena hotelera global con fuerte presencia internacional y programa de fidelización reconocido.
description_en: A global hotel company with a strong international presence and a highly recognized loyalty program.

description_es: Grupo hotelero internacional asociado a marcas premium, lifestyle y lujo.
description_en: An international hotel group associated with Premium, Lifestyle, and Luxury brands.

description_es: Grupo hotelero internacional con marcas reconocidas en segmentos corporativos, vacacionales y urbanos.
description_en: An international hotel group with well-established brands across corporate, leisure, and urban hospitality segments.

description_es: Grupo hotelero internacional con fuerte presencia en segmentos economy, midscale y franquicias.
description_en: An international hotel group with a strong presence across the Economy, Midscale, and franchise segments.

description_es: Grupo hotelero con marcas enfocadas en diferentes niveles de servicio y modelos de franquicia.
description_en: A hotel group operating multiple brands across different service levels through a franchise-based business model.

description_es: Grupo hotelero global con marcas desde económicas hasta lujo y fuerte presencia internacional.
description_en: A global hotel group with brands ranging from Economy to Luxury and a strong international presence.

description_es: Huéspedes que buscan experiencias exclusivas, altos niveles de servicio y mayor disposición al pago.
description_en: Guests seeking exclusive experiences, exceptional service levels, and demonstrating a high willingness to pay.

description_es: Segmento de reuniones, incentivos, congresos y eventos con necesidades específicas de de espacios y servicios.
description_en: The Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions segment, requiring specialized event spaces and dedicated services.

description_es: Huéspedes que viajan en familia, que valoran la comodidad, la seguridad, la atención a niños y la flexibilidad.
description_en: Guests traveling with family members who value comfort, safety, child-friendly services, and flexibility.

description_es: Segmento de personas o viajeros individuales en viaje de negocios o trabajo individual.
description_en: A segment consisting of individual travelers whose primary purpose is business or professional travel.

description_es: Huéspedes que viajan por recreación, descanso o turismo, sensibles al precio y la oferta del destino.
description_en: Guests traveling for recreation, relaxation, or tourism, typically influenced by price and destination appeal.

description_es: Segmento vacacional de ocio enfocado en viajes en pareja, escapadas románticas o celebraciones de aniversarios.
description_en: A leisure travel segment focused on romantic getaways, couple vacations, and anniversary celebrations.

description_es: Estrategia enfocada en tarifas elevadas justificadas por la máxima calidad, exclusividad y estatus superior.
description_en: A positioning strategy focused on premium pricing supported by exceptional quality, exclusivity, and prestigious brand perception.

description_es: Segmento premium de tarifas altas pero accesible, que ofrece servicios superiores y diseño cuidado.
description_en: An upscale market segment offering premium-quality services, refined design, and elevated guest experiences while remaining broadly accessible.

description_es: Posicionamiento en el segmento medio con una relación equilibrada entre calidad, precio y facilidades estándar.
description_en: A positioning strategy focused on the mid-market segment, balancing quality, price, and standard amenities.

description_es: Enfoque en tarifas bajas limitando servicios innecesarios para captar clientes muy sensibles al precio.
description_en: A positioning strategy focused on affordable rates by limiting non-essential services while meeting the needs of highly price-sensitive travelers.

description_es: Enfoque en estancias largas equipando las habitaciones con cocina integrada y servicios adaptados semipermanentes.
description_en: A lodging concept designed for long-term stays, featuring in-room kitchens and services tailored to semi-permanent guests.

description_es: Posicionamiento basado en diseño contemporáneo, ambiente social activo y experiencias locales singulares.
description_en: A positioning strategy built around contemporary design, vibrant social environments, and authentic local experiences.

description_es: Espacio reservado para futuros conceptos que puedan transformar la disciplina del Revenue Management.
description_en: A reserved space for future concepts that may transform the discipline of Revenue Management.

description_es: Elemento reservado para futuras innovaciones todavía no consolidadas dentro del sector hotelero.
description_en: A reserved element for future innovations that have not yet become established within the hospitality industry.

description_es: Espacio abierto para nuevas metodologías, tecnologías o modelos de negocio aún por descubrir.
description_en: An open space reserved for new methodologies, technologies, or business models yet to be discovered.

description_es: Elemento reservado para futuras generaciones de Revenue Management.
description_en: A reserved element for future generations of Revenue Management.

description_es: Asistente generativo inteligente para resumir informes, redactar correos de respuesta y automatizar tareas diarias de revenue management.
description_en: An intelligent generative assistant designed to summarize reports, draft responses, and automate daily Revenue Management tasks.

description_es: Modelos predictivos avanzados que analizan patrones históricos de reservas, eventos locales y tendencias climáticas para optimizar la previsión.
description_en: Advanced predictive models that analyze historical booking patterns, local events, and weather trends to improve demand forecasting.

description_es: Motores de personalización orientados a adaptar tarifas, extras y paquetes dinámicamente según el perfil e historial del huésped.
description_en: Personalization engines designed to dynamically tailor room rates, packages, and ancillary services according to each guest's profile and booking history.

description_es: Automatización inteligente de flujos de trabajo repetitivos y reglas tarifarias complejas en tiempo real sin intervención humana.
description_en: Intelligent automation of repetitive workflows and complex pricing rules in real time without human intervention.

description_es: Información accionable generada por inteligencia artificial a partir del análisis de datos, tendencias y comportamientos para apoyar la toma de decisiones hoteleras.
description_en: Actionable insights generated through Artificial Intelligence by analyzing data, trends, and customer behavior to support hotel decision-making.

description_es: Agentes conversacionales inteligentes entrenados en el inventario del hotel para solventar dudas, gestionar solicitudes y procesar reservas directas.
description_en: Intelligent conversational agents trained on the hotel's inventory to answer guest questions, manage requests, and process direct bookings.

description_es: Sistemas prescriptivos basados en aprendizaje profundo para sugerir y ejecutar variaciones de precios con un nivel de confianza calculado.
description_en: Prescriptive systems based on deep learning that recommend and execute pricing decisions with calculated confidence levels.
